name: Venison (Deer-elk-etc.) Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds round steak, 3/4- to 1-inch thick, cut 3 inches by 4 inches
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge meat pieces in salted and peppered flour mixed with dry mustard.
2. Brown the dredged pieces in bacon grease.
3. Place in a covered casserole or crock pot and cover with a mixture of all other ingredients.
4. Add enough liquid (stock or water) so that the pieces are fully submerged.
5. Bake at 300 degrees F for 2½ to 3 hours, until meat is tender.
6. Remove cover and bake until sauce thickens.
